commit.message:
feat: add backend CI workflow + env var defaults + health db mode

- Added .github/workflows/backend-ci.yml (runs unit tests + startup check)
- Added defaults for WEATHER_API_URL, JWT_EXPIRES_IN, JWT_SECRET
- Health endpoint now shows dbMode (supabase-rest vs pg-direct)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Deploy pipeline: write .env from GitHub secrets on each deploy

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix all security vulnerabilities

- Remove hardcoded admin credentials, replace with server-side auth API
- Add authentication checks to admin API routes (registrations + export)
- Create /api/admin/login route with scrypt password verification and secure cookies
- Fix SQL injection in test_phase4.py (use parameterized query)
- Replace dummy bcrypt hash in seed with proper scrypt-based hashing
- Sanitize all error responses in AgentDaily server (no more e.message leaks)
- Add CORS middleware with explicit origin allowlist to AgentDaily
- Add input validation (bounds, length limits) on admin query params
- Add HTTPS enforcement for Stripe redirect URLs in production
- Guard DEV_SKIP_PAYMENT with NODE_ENV !== production check
- Add CSRF origin validation on registration POST endpoint
- Use safe YAML deserialization with tag restriction in ActionItemsTools.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Improve accessibility: add skip link, aria-expanded, focus states, and touch targets

- Add skip-to-content link for keyboard navigation
- Add aria-expanded state management to hamburger menu
- Improve section label color contrast from #1a8fd1 to #5eb3ff
- Add visible focus outlines (2px) for all interactive elements
- Increase button min-height to 44px for better mobile touch targets
- Add focus styling to nav links, buttons, and back-to-top button
- Improve hamburger button minimum size to 44x44px
- All focus states use orange color for consistency

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix diff content click-to-collapse, use closest() for child elements

commit.message:
audit: resolve circular dependency detection finding - feature verified working

The audit finding claiming circular_dependencies returns integer 0 was a false positive.
Re-verification confirms the feature is fully functional:
- JSON output correctly shows circular_dependencies: [] (empty array, not integer)
- Data structure matches documentation (array of objects with packages and severity)
- Zero circular dependencies is accurate for this well-designed DAG architecture
- Detection logic properly implemented in internal/analyzer/package.go:225-309
- Initialization correct in cmd/analyze_finalize.go:26

Manual verification of package dependencies confirms clean hierarchy with no cycles:
config/metrics → analyzer/scanner/storage/reporter → generator → api → cmd

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

service from an empty repository.

feat: add 8 new tools, native drawing with thickness, Docker support

New tools (35 -> 43):
- draw_ellipse: native ellipse via app.useTool()
- fill_area: flood fill via native paint bucket
- replace_color: replace all occurrences of a color
- flip_sprite: horizontal/vertical canvas flip
- rotate_sprite: 90/180/270 degree rotation
- flatten_layers: merge all layers into one
- merge_down: merge layer with layer below
- outline: add outline around non-transparent pixels

Enhanced tools:
- draw_line: added thickness param (native brush when > 1)
- draw_rect: added thickness param (native brush when > 1)
- draw_circle: added thickness param (native brush when > 1)

Infrastructure:
- Docker support (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, .dockerignore)
- Updated README with new tools, Docker section
- 148 tests passing (was 124)
- Version bumped to 1.1.0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

work independently.

commit.message:
Fix git-status URL race: don't overwrite URL on session change

onSessionChange was calling updateAppletUrlParam which triggered
history.replaceState, firing a Navigation API 'replace' event that
overwrote the user's explicitly navigated path. Now onSessionChange
only updates internal state and refreshes — URL stays as navigated.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Feature/router tests (#1)

* test: add users and groups router test suites

- 52 tests for users router (51 passing, 1 todo for balance deadlock)
- 93 tests for groups router (all passing)
- withTestContext helper with Proxy-based $transaction shim and callerAs()
- Groups seeded via API, users via DB (no create user API)
- All tests run in rollback transactions for isolation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* test: remove old broken test files

These tests hardcoded user IDs expecting pre-seeded data that doesn't exist
in CI's fresh database. Replaced by comprehensive test suites in tests/routers/
that properly seed data via API calls and use withTestContext for isolation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* test: update groups test suite for description→title rename

Transaction field was renamed from 'description' to 'title' on main.
Updated all createTransaction, updateTransaction, and direct Prisma
transaction creation calls in the test suite to use the new field name.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: disable type-checked ESLint rules for JS files

The type-checked ESLint configs (recommendedTypeChecked, stylisticTypeChecked)
were applied to all files including .js, but parserOptions with projectService
was only configured for .ts/.tsx files, causing errors on src/env.js.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: resolve pre-existing lint errors

- Remove unnecessary type assertions on transaction.category
- Remove unused TransactionCategory imports
- Use dot notation instead of bracket notation in balance tests

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: backtesting audit — slippage direction, time-exit slippage, ProfitFactor basis

AUDIT FIX 2026-07: Three bugs found and fixed:

1. TradeSimulator.ApplySlippage: Used isFavorable (tpHit) as direction
   toggle, which was wrong for 2/4 scenarios (short TP and long SL got
   favorable slippage instead of unfavorable). Now uses isLong for
   correct direction: long close = sell = price DOWN, short close = buy
   = price UP.

2. TradeSimulator quick-sim + full SimulateTrade: Time-based exits and
   end-of-data exits did not apply slippage at all, despite being market
   orders. Now consistently applies slippage to all exit types.

3. CausalBacktestingService + AnalyticsCausalBacktestingService:
   GrossProfit/GrossLoss tracked raw pips instead of USD (realizedPnL).
   This made ProfitFactor misleading across mixed asset types.
   BacktestingService was already fixed (AUDIT FIX 2026-06); now all
   services are consistent.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix cgroup check to be fully idempotent

Previous version used || which would re-run sed if either flag was
missing individually, potentially doubling flags and breaking boot.

New logic:
- Uses && so it only skips if BOTH flags are already present
- Strips any partial/duplicate flags before writing
- Prints the resulting cmdline.txt so you can verify before rebooting

Safe to run multiple times on the same node.

commit.message:
Fix #64: use examples array and enum values in auto-generated schema examples (#73)

- get_example_from_schema now checks for the JSON Schema draft 6+ 'examples'
  array (plural) and uses its first element as a fallback after 'example'
  (singular) but before dispatching to the type handler.

- Moved enum handling from StringExampleHandler up to ScalarExampleHandler so
  that integer, number, and boolean properties with an 'enum' field also render
  the first enum value instead of falling through to the type default (0,
  10.12, True).

- 'example' (singular) still takes precedence over 'examples' (plural) which
  takes precedence over enum which takes precedence over type/format defaults.

     is fully self-contained (no live backend required)
  2. React fiber introspection walks all memoizedState hook chains across

     Next.js App Router and Pages Router deployments; sets
     stsTokenManager.expirationTime to the past to force token refresh

     router.replace('/login')

  approach and remove obsolete GCS environment-limitation note

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

kernel: fix WiFi by adding mask_data0 to sun9i_a80_cfg

sun9i_a80_cfg in drivers/mmc/host/sunxi-mmc.c was missing mask_data0=true,
causing every MMC clock update on mmc1 (BCM4330 SDIO) to time out with
WAIT_PRE_OVER while DATA0 was held low by the uninitialised chip. Each
timeout set priv->fatal_err=1, permanently preventing card initialisation.

Setting mask_data0=true makes the driver set SDXC_MASK_DATA0 (CLKCR bit 31)
before clock-only updates, so the hardware ignores DATA0 state and updates
complete immediately. BCM4330 then initialises normally and wlan0 appears.

All other recent SoC configs (sun50i_a64, sun20i_d1, sun50i_h616) already
had this flag set; sun9i was the only one missing it.

- patches/kernel/0003-mmc-sunxi-Add-mask_data0-to-sun9i-A80-config.patch

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: correct WASM artifact output path in CI workflows

PowerVelo.pro sets DESTDIR = build/release, so the WASM linker
outputs to build-wasm/build/release/ not build-wasm/ directly.

Update the Package Wasm artifacts step in release.yml and the
Upload Wasm artifact path list in build.yml to reference the
correct subdirectory. This unblocks the entire WASM deploy chain:
  build_wasm packages → wasm-zip artifact → publish deploys →
  docs/app/ gets WASM files committed → GitHub Pages serves app.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

full vault-path-prefixed [[layer/sublayer/target|Display]] links in 15 files.

Changes by file:
- chroma_vector_store.md: rag_architecture, vector_stores
- dspy_prompt_optimization.md: dspy_systematic_prompting, rag_architecture, prompting_strategies, structured_outputs
- instructor_structured_outputs.md: structured_outputs, prompting_strategies, function_calling
- langsmith_llm_observability.md: llm_observability, ai_application_architecture, ml_observability
- llamaguard_content_moderation.md: safety_and_content_moderation, prompt_injection_and_guardrails, ai_application_architecture
- mcp_server_implementation.md: mcp_protocol, agentic_coding, repo_rag_for_code, llm_code_generation
- peft_lora_finetuning.md: peft_and_lora, finetuning_strategies, rl_finetuning, instruction_data_design
- trl_preference_training.md: rl_finetuning, alignment_and_rlhf, instruction_data_design
- vllm_serving.md: serving_frameworks, quantization_overview, attention_and_kv_cache, llm_observability
- containerised_api_service.md: fastapi_patterns, docker_patterns, kubernetes_basics, cicd_pipelines, github_actions, testing_strategies, pytest_testing_patterns, kubernetes_deployment

commit.message:
Revise timeline: single designer, sequential design sprints, HP+LP launch scope

Constraints updated per PM input:
- Single designer works sequentially (was incorrectly modelled as two parallel sprints)
- Priority order: Homepage → Landing Page → PDP (post-launch) → PLP (post-launch)

Timeline changes:
- HP design: Mar 11–18 (gate Mar 18, HP dev starts)
- LP design: Mar 18–25 (gate Mar 25, LP dev starts same day — dual gate with HP assets)
- PDP design: Mar 25–Apr 1 (post-launch gate; custom PDP follows after April 11)
- LP dev: Mar 25–Apr 1 (was incorrectly Mar 28–Apr 4)
- LP copy due: Mar 28; LP assets due: Apr 1 (hard)
- April 11 launch scope explicitly stated as Homepage + Anniversary LP only

Content aligned across gantt, checkpoint table, phase accordions, milestones, exec summary.
Reviewer-caught conflict (LP assets Mar 28 vs Apr 1) resolved before commit.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
